use_cases: Primary action triggers for forms and CTAs
Destructive actions like delete or remove operations
Icon-only buttons for compact UI toolbars
Ghost-style buttons for tertiary actions in interfaces
ai_summary: A reusable React Button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, small, large, icon) built on Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority. Supports composition via asChild prop, includes focus-visible accessibility rings, disabled states, and smooth color transitions for hover and active states. Styled with Tailwind CSS for consistent theming across SaaS and web applications.
